content: NexusMods API: v2 GraphQL (graphql.nexusmods.com, mostly OAuth-gated) + legacy v1 REST. Vortex uses OAuth 2.0 (browser flow -> code -> JWT access token carrying premium claim); personal API keys also exist. nxm:// one-click links carry gameId/modId/fileId (+ key/expires for premium auto-download); handler parses URL then calls getDownloadURLs to get CDN mirrors. Non-premium users must click through manual confirm (no direct CDN). Collections = curated revisions fetched via GraphQL; rate limits enforced (handle RateLimitError). App must register as nxm:// scheme handler with the desktop/OS.
